title: అద్భుత సంజీవని కథ
moral: పిల్లలూ, అంకితభావం, ధైర్యం ఉంటే ఎలాంటి అసాధ్యమైన పనైనా సాధించవచ్చు.
main_character: Hanuman: a powerful vanara (divine monkey) with reddish-gold fur and an intelligent, noble face. Wearing an orange-red dhoti with a golden belt; broad chest, strong arms, a long tail curved upward behind him. Often depicted carrying a gada (mace) or with hands folded in anjali mudra (namaste). Devoted, fearless expression — NOT a comical monkey; a divine warrior and devotee. Always the same character across every scene.
setting: The battlefield in Lanka, a place of intense conflict, transitions to the majestic, snow-capped peaks of the Himalayan mountains. The scenes unfold under the pale light of a moonlit night, giving way to the first hints of dawn. Same location across every scene.

scenes.text: అది లంక యుద్ధభూమిలో ఒక చీకటి రాత్రి, పిల్లలూ. ఆకాశంలో చంద్రుడు మసకగా ఉన్నాడు, దూరంగా ఆయుధాల చప్పుళ్ళు — భయంకరంగా వినిపిస్తున్నాయి. ఇంతలో, ఇంద్రజిత్తు బాణం ఒకటి లక్ష్మణుడిని తాకింది. వెంటనే లక్ష్మణుడు కళ్ళు మూసుకుని, నేల మీద పడిపోయాడు. రాముడి గుండె ఒక్కసారిగా ఆగిపోయింది, కళ్ళల్లో నీళ్ళు నిండాయి. రాముడు ఆవేదనతో, 'లక్ష్మణా!' అని పిలిచాడు — ఆ పిలుపు అడంతా నిశ్శబ్దం చేసింది. అప్పుడు హనుమంతుడు, ఆ దృశ్యాన్ని చూసి, ఒక క్షణం దిగ్భ్రాంతి చెందాడు... లక్ష్మణుడు మళ్ళీ కళ్ళు తెరుస్తాడా? ఏం జరుగుతుందో తెలుసా?
scenes.image_prompt: The injured warrior collapses onto the ground, his eyes closing as he falls. The other warrior watches with tears welling in his eyes, his face filled with anguish. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Lakshmana: a young prince (mid-twenties) with a warm golden-brown complexion, muscular and alert — slightly shorter and more compact than Rama. During forest exile: wearing saffron-orange bark cloth (valkala), matted hair tied in a topknot, carrying his bow and full quiver, always standing in a protective, watchful posture. He is NOT old, NOT a monk, NOT grey-haired — he is a vigorous young warrior-prince. Determined, loyal expression; the devoted younger brother. Soft golden afternoon sunlight, warm hopeful mood.
scenes.scene_visual: The injured warrior collapses onto the ground, his eyes closing as he falls. The other warrior watches with tears welling in his eyes, his face filled with anguish.
scenes.text_te_en: Adi Lanka Yuddhabhumilo Oka Chikati Raatri, Pillalu. Aakaashanlo Chandrudu Masakagaa Unnaadu, Durangaa Aayudhaala Chappullu — Bhayankarangaa Vinipistunnaayi. Intalo, Indrajittu Baanam Okati Lakshmanudini Taakindi. Ventane Lakshmanudu Kallu Musukuni, Nela Mida Padipoyaadu. Raamudi Gunde Okkasaarigaa Aagipoyindi, Kallallo Nillu Nindaayi. Raamudu Aavedanato, 'Lakshmanaa!' Ani Pilichaadu — Aa Pilupu Adantaa Nishshabdam Chesindi. Appudu Hanumantudu, Aa Drrishyaanni Chusi, Oka Kshanam Digbhraanti Chendaadu... Lakshmanudu Malli Kallu Terustaadaa? Em Jarugutundo Telusaa?
scenes.text_en: It was a dark night on the battlefield of Lanka, children. The moon in the sky was dim, and the sounds of weapons in the distance were terrifying. Just then, an arrow from Indrajit struck Lakshmana. Immediately, Lakshmana closed his eyes and fell to the ground. Rama's heart stopped for a moment, and his eyes filled with tears. Rama called out in anguish, 'Lakshmana!' — that call silenced everything around. Then Hanuman, seeing that sight, was stunned for a moment... Will Lakshmana open his eyes again? Do you know what will happen?

scenes.text: లక్ష్మణుడు అలా పడి ఉండగా, ఆ చల్లటి, తడి గాలిలో యుద్ధభూమి నిశ్శబ్దమైంది. అప్పుడు జాంబవంతుడు ముందుకు వచ్చాడు, అతని మాటల్లో ఆశ కనిపించింది. 'దానాగారి పర్వతం నుండి సంజీవని తెస్తేనే లక్ష్మణుడు బ్రతుకుతాడు!' అని గంభీరంగా చెప్పాడు. రాముడి కళ్ళల్లో ఒక చిన్న ఆశ మెరిసింది. ఆ మాట వినగానే, హనుమంతుడు ఒక్క క్షణం కూడా ఆలోచించలేదు — వెంటనే తన బాధ్యతను గుర్తించాడు. ఇంత దూరంలో ఉన్న సంజీవనిని, తెల్లవారే లోపు ఎవరు తీసుకురాగలరు?
scenes.image_prompt: An old, wise figure stands before the group, speaking with a serious and hopeful tone. Another powerful figure, listening intently, shows a sudden resolve in his eyes, ready to act. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Rama: a young prince with dark blue-black (shyama) complexion, tall and broad-shouldered, long arms reaching to his knees (Ajanabahu). During forest exile: wearing saffron-orange bark cloth (valkala), matted hair tied in a topknot (jata-mukuta), carrying his curved bow Kodanda and a quiver of arrows over his shoulder. Lotus-shaped eyes with a gentle reddish tinge at the corners. Noble, calm expression. Diffused daylight, gentle curious mood (NOT dark, NOT stormy).
scenes.scene_visual: An old, wise figure stands before the group, speaking with a serious and hopeful tone. Another powerful figure, listening intently, shows a sudden resolve in his eyes, ready to act.
scenes.text_te_en: Lakshmanudu Alaa Padi Undagaa, Aa Challati, Tadi Gaalilo Yuddhabhumi Nishshabdamaindi. Appudu Jaambavantudu Munduku Vachchaadu, Atani Maatallo Aasha Kanipinchindi. 'Daanaagaari Parvatam Nundi Sanjivani Testene Lakshmanudu Bratukutaadu!' Ani Gambhirangaa Cheppaadu. Raamudi Kallallo Oka Chinna Aasha Merisindi. Aa Maata Vinagaane, Hanumantudu Okka Kshanam Kudaa Aalochinchaledu — Ventane Tana Baadhyatanu Gurtinchaadu. Inta Duranlo Unna Sanjivanini, Tellavaare Lopu Evaru Tisukuraagalaru?
scenes.text_en: As Lakshmana lay there, the battlefield became silent in the cold, damp air. Then Jambavan stepped forward, and hope appeared in his words. He gravely said, 'Lakshmana will only live if Sanjeevani is brought from the Dronagiri mountain!' A small spark of hope shone in Rama's eyes. As soon as he heard those words, Hanuman didn't think for a moment — he immediately recognized his duty. Who could bring the Sanjeevani from such a distance before dawn?

scenes.text: హనుమంతుడు ఆకాశంలోకి ఒక్కసారిగా దూసుకుపోయాడు, అతని చెవుల్లో గాలి హోరుమని శబ్దం చేస్తోంది. సముద్రపు ఉప్పని వాసన గాలిలో కలిసి, అతనిని మరింత వేగంగా ముందుకు నడిపింది. లక్ష్మణుడి కోసం, తన రాముడి కోసం — హనుమంతుడు ఆశగా వెళ్ళిపోతున్నాడు. ఇంతలో, ఒక మోసపూరితమైన రాక్షసి అతని దారికి అడ్డుపడింది. హనుమంతుడు ఒక్క క్షణం ఆగి, 'ఈ దారిలో నన్ను ఆపేవారే లేరు!' అని గంభీరంగా అన్నాడు. ఆమెను పక్కకు తప్పించి, మరింత వేగంగా దూసుకుపోయాడు. మరి, ఇంకేమైనా అడ్డంకులు ఎదురవుతాయో...?
scenes.image_prompt: The powerful flying figure pauses mid-air, confronting a deceptive demoness blocking his path. He firmly pushes her aside with a determined expression, then accelerates rapidly through the sky. Diffused daylight, gentle curious mood (NOT dark, NOT stormy).
scenes.scene_visual: The powerful flying figure pauses mid-air, confronting a deceptive demoness blocking his path. He firmly pushes her aside with a determined expression, then accelerates rapidly through the sky.
scenes.text_te_en: Hanumantudu Aakaashanloki Okkasaarigaa Dusukupoyaadu, Atani Chevullo Gaali Horumani Shabdam Chestondi. Samudrapu Uppani Vaasana Gaalilo Kalisi, Atanini Marinta Vegangaa Munduku Nadipindi. Lakshmanudi Kosan, Tana Raamudi Kosam — Hanumantudu Aashagaa Vellipotunnaadu. Intalo, Oka Mosapuritamaina Raakshasi Atani Daariki Addupadindi. Hanumantudu Okka Kshanam Aagi, 'I Daarilo Nannu Aapevaare Leru!' Ani Gambhirangaa Annaadu. Aamenu Pakkaku Tappinchi, Marinta Vegangaa Dusukupoyaadu. Mari, Inkemainaa Addankulu Eduravutaayo...?
scenes.text_en: Hanuman soared into the sky, the wind roaring in his ears. The salty smell of the sea mixed with the air, pushing him forward even faster. For Lakshmana, for his Rama — Hanuman was flying with hope. Just then, a cunning demoness blocked his path. Hanuman paused for a moment and gravely said, 'No one can stop me on this path!' He pushed her aside and sped forward even faster. Will he face any more obstacles...?

scenes.text: హిమాలయాల్లోని ద్రోణాగిరి పర్వతం మీద హనుమంతుడు దిగాడు. అక్కడ, చల్లని, మంచుతో కూడిన గాలిలో — ఎన్నో దివ్యమైన ఓషధులు ప్రకాశిస్తున్నాయి. కానీ, ఏది సంజీవని? ఏది కాదో తెలియలేదు. సమయం వేగంగా గడిచిపోతోంది, తెల్లవారుజాము దగ్గరపడుతోంది. హనుమంతుడికి ఆందోళన కలిగింది, అతని కళ్ళల్లో ఆత్రుత స్పష్టంగా కనిపించింది. 'ఇందులో ఏది సంజీవని? సమయం లేదు!' అని తనలో తాను అనుకున్నాడు. అన్నింటిలో సరైనది ఎలా కనుగొంటాడు?
scenes.image_prompt: The powerful figure stands on a cold, snowy mountain peak, surrounded by many glowing herbs. His eyes dart frantically among the plants, a clear look of anxiety and urgency on his face. Dappled shade with quiet contemplative light.
scenes.scene_visual: The powerful figure stands on a cold, snowy mountain peak, surrounded by many glowing herbs. His eyes dart frantically among the plants, a clear look of anxiety and urgency on his face.
scenes.text_te_en: Himaalayaalloni Dronaagiri Parvatam Mida Hanumantudu Digaadu. Akkada, Challani, Manchuto Kudina Gaalilo — Enno Divyamaina Oshadhulu Prakaashistunnaayi. Kaani, Edi Sanjivani? Edi Kaado Teliyaledu. Samayam Vegangaa Gadichipotondi, Tellavaarujaamu Daggarapadutondi. Hanumantudiki Aandolana Kaligindi, Atani Kallallo Aatruta Spashtangaa Kanipinchindi. 'Indulo Edi Sanjivani? Samayam Ledu!' Ani Tanalo Taanu Anukunnaadu. Annintilo Sarainadi Elaa Kanugontaadu?
scenes.text_en: Hanuman landed on Dronagiri mountain in the Himalayas. There, in the cold, icy air — many divine herbs were glowing. But he didn't know which one was Sanjeevani and which wasn't. Time was passing quickly, and dawn was approaching. Hanuman felt anxious, and his urgency was clearly visible in his eyes. He thought to himself, 'Which one is Sanjeevani? There's no time!' How would he find the right one among all of them?

scenes.text: లక్ష్మణుడి ప్రాణాల కోసం హనుమంతుడు ఒక్క క్షణం ఆలోచించలేదు. అతని భక్తి, ధైర్యం — అన్నీ ఒక్కటైపోయాయి. అప్పుడు హనుమంతుడిలో దైవశక్తి ఒక్కసారిగా ప్రవహించింది. 'లక్ష్మణుని ప్రాణాల కోసం, ఈ పర్వతాన్నే తీసుకువెళ్తాను!' అని అచంచలమైన విశ్వాసంతో అన్నాడు. అతను పర్వతాన్ని ఎత్తడానికి సిద్ధమయ్యాడు. ఆ ప్రాచీనమైన రాళ్ళు, మట్టి అతని శక్తివంతమైన చేతులకు గట్టిగా తగిలాయి. హనుమంతుడు నిజంగా ఒక పర్వతాన్నే మోయగలడా? మళ్ళీ ఏం జరుగుతుందో?
scenes.image_prompt: The powerful figure, filled with divine energy, firmly grasps the base of a massive mountain. His hands are pressed against the ancient rocks and soil, his expression one of unwavering resolve. Dappled shade with quiet contemplative light.
scenes.scene_visual: The powerful figure, filled with divine energy, firmly grasps the base of a massive mountain. His hands are pressed against the ancient rocks and soil, his expression one of unwavering resolve.
scenes.text_te_en: Lakshmanudi Praanaala Kosam Hanumantudu Okka Kshanam Aalochinchaledu. Atani Bhakti, Dhairyam — Anni Okkataipoyaayi. Appudu Hanumantudilo Daivashakti Okkasaarigaa Pravahinchindi. 'Lakshmanuni Praanaala Kosan, I Parvataanne Tisukuveltaanu!' Ani Achanchalamaina Vishvaasanto Annaadu. Atanu Parvataanni Ettadaaniki Siddhamayyaadu. Aa Praachinamaina Raallu, Matti Atani Shaktivantamaina Chetulaku Gattigaa Tagilaayi. Hanumantudu Nijangaa Oka Parvataanne Moyagaladaa? Malli Em Jarugutundo?
scenes.text_en: Hanuman didn't hesitate for a moment for Lakshmana's life. His devotion and courage — all became one. Then divine power flowed through Hanuman all at once. He said with unwavering faith, 'For Lakshmana's life, I will take this entire mountain!' He got ready to lift the mountain. The ancient rocks and soil firmly touched his powerful hands. Can Hanuman really carry an entire mountain? What will happen next?

scenes.text: హనుమంతుడు పర్వతాన్ని భుజం మీద పెట్టుకుని, ఆకాశంలో వేగంగా ప్రయాణిస్తున్నాడు. కింద, భరతుడు ఆకాశంలో పర్వతాన్ని మోస్తున్న హనుమంతుడిని చూశాడు. 'ఎవరు ఆకాశంలో పర్వతాన్ని మోస్తున్నది?' అని ఆశ్చర్యపోయాడు. పొరపాటున, భరతుడు బాణం వేశాడు. పర్వతం ఒక్క క్షణం భూమిని సున్నితంగా తాకింది. వెంటనే హనుమంతుడు తన ప్రయాణాన్ని తిరిగి మొదలుపెట్టాడు. తెల్లవారే లోపు హనుమంతుడు లంక చేరుకుంటాడా, లేక సమయం మించిపోతుందా?
scenes.image_prompt: A figure flies through the sky, carrying an entire mountain on his shoulder. Below, another warrior aims and releases an arrow towards the flying figure, his face showing surprise. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Bharata: a young prince with a fair complexion, wearing a simple white dhoti and minimal ornaments (he lives in austerity while Rama is in exile). Gentle, grief-stricken yet dignified expression. Carries Rama's sandals (paduka) as a symbol of his brother's authority. Bright clear daylight, playful energetic mood.
scenes.scene_visual: A figure flies through the sky, carrying an entire mountain on his shoulder. Below, another warrior aims and releases an arrow towards the flying figure, his face showing surprise.
scenes.text_te_en: Hanumantudu Parvataanni Bhujam Mida Pettukuni, Aakaashanlo Vegangaa Prayaanistunnaadu. Kinda, Bharatudu Aakaashanlo Parvataanni Mostunna Hanumantudini Chushaadu. 'Evaru Aakaashanlo Parvataanni Mostunnadi?' Ani Aashcharyapoyaadu. Porapaatuna, Bharatudu Baanam Veshaadu. Parvatam Okka Kshanam Bhumini Sunnitangaa Taakindi. Ventane Hanumantudu Tana Prayaanaanni Tirigi Modalupettaadu. Tellavaare Lopu Hanumantudu Lanka Cherukuntaadaa, Leka Samayam Minchipotundaa?
scenes.text_en: Hanuman placed the mountain on his shoulder and traveled swiftly through the sky. Below, Bharata saw Hanuman carrying the mountain in the sky. He wondered, 'Who is carrying a mountain in the sky?' By mistake, Bharata shot an arrow. The mountain gently touched the ground for a moment. Immediately, Hanuman resumed his journey. Will Hanuman reach Lanka before dawn, or will time run out?

scenes.text: చివరకు, హనుమంతుడు ద్రోణాగిరి పర్వతాన్ని లంకకు తీసుకువచ్చాడు. సంజీవని ఆకులను లక్ష్మణుడికి అందించగానే, ఆ తీయని, మట్టి వాసన గాలిలో నిండిపోయింది. ఒక దివ్యమైన కాంతి లక్ష్మణుడి చుట్టూ ప్రసరించింది — అంతా చల్లటి గాలి, పువ్వుల వర్షం. లక్ష్మణుడు మెల్లగా కళ్ళు తెరిచాడు! రాముడి కళ్ళల్లో ఆనందం, హనుమంతుడి గుండెలో విజయం. రాముడు హనుమంతుడి వైపు చూసి, 'హనుమా! నీ సేవకు నేను ఎప్పటికీ రుణపడి ఉంటాను!' అని ప్రేమగా అన్నాడు. న్యాయం జరిగింది, భక్తి శక్తి ముందు చెడు నిలవలేకపోయింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The injured warrior slowly opens his eyes, a divine light radiating around him. The other warrior watches with immense joy on his face, while the powerful figure beside him shows a look of triumph. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Lakshmana: a young prince (mid-twenties) with a warm golden-brown complexion, muscular and alert — slightly shorter and more compact than Rama. During forest exile: wearing saffron-orange bark cloth (valkala), matted hair tied in a topknot, carrying his bow and full quiver, always standing in a protective, watchful posture. He is NOT old, NOT a monk, NOT grey-haired — he is a vigorous young warrior-prince. Determined, loyal expression; the devoted younger brother. Warm golden-hour glow, triumphant peaceful mood.
scenes.scene_visual: The injured warrior slowly opens his eyes, a divine light radiating around him. The other warrior watches with immense joy on his face, while the powerful figure beside him shows a look of triumph.
scenes.text_te_en: Chivaraku, Hanumantudu Dronaagiri Parvataanni Lankaku Tisukuvachchaadu. Sanjivani Aakulanu Lakshmanudiki Andinchagaane, Aa Tiyani, Matti Vaasana Gaalilo Nindipoyindi. Oka Divyamaina Kaanti Lakshmanudi Chuttu Prasarinchindi — Antaa Challati Gaali, Puvvula Varshan. Lakshmanudu Mellagaa Kallu Terichaadu! Raamudi Kallallo Aanandan, Hanumantudi Gundelo Vijayan. Raamudu Hanumantudi Vaipu Chusi, 'Hanumaa! Ni Sevaku Nenu Eppatiki Runapadi Untaanu!' Ani Premagaa Annaadu. Nyaayam Jarigindi, Bhakti Shakti Mundu Chedu Nilavalekapoyindi.
scenes.text_en: Finally, Hanuman brought Dronagiri mountain to Lanka. As soon as the Sanjeevani leaves were given to Lakshmana, a sweet, earthy scent filled the air. A divine light spread around Lakshmana — with cool air and a shower of flowers. Lakshmana slowly opened his eyes! Joy in Rama's eyes, and triumph in Hanuman's heart. Rama looked at Hanuman and lovingly said, 'Hanuma! I will forever be indebted to your service!' Justice was served, and evil could not stand before the power of devotion.

quality_scores.notes: This story is highly engaging and authentic, truly capturing the warmth of an oral narration with excellent use of direct address and suspense hooks. The narrative arc is compelling, and dialogue is vivid. To elevate it to award-worthy status, the primary focus should be on enhancing emotional depth by consistently showing feelings through actions and sensory details, rather than stating them directly. Additionally, the explicit moral statement at the very end should be removed, allowing the powerful events to convey the message naturally.

moral_te_en: Pillalu, Ankitabhaavan, Dhairyam Unte Elaanti Asaadhyamaina Panainaa Saadhinchavachchu.
moral_en: Children, if you have dedication and courage, you can achieve any impossible task.
